site.title: Alejandro Clemente | Senior Software Engineer
site.description: Portfolio of Alejandro Clemente, a full stack developer focused on backend systems, frontend architecture, and reliable product delivery.

hero.description: I am Alejandro Clemente, a full stack developer working across Node.js, NestJS, React, and .NET. My focus is straightforward: ship maintainable systems, reduce complexity, and keep teams moving.

items: Designing modular backend services that stay easy to extend.
Building frontend systems that balance clarity, speed, and reuse.
Improving delivery through automation, testing, and predictable releases.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I work best on product teams that value clean architecture, pragmatic execution, and steady delivery.

cards.title: Simple systems, strong foundations
cards.text: I care about structure, naming, separation of concerns, and code that remains readable after the first release. The goal is not abstraction for its own sake, but software that survives change.

cards.title: Product thinking with engineering discipline
cards.text: I can move across backend, frontend, data, and delivery workflows while keeping the outcome tied to business value, maintainability, and production readiness.

stack.title: Stack
stack.subtitle: Technologies I use to build web platforms, internal tools, and API-driven products.

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: A few examples of the systems and product areas where I can contribute.

projects.title: Structured systems for evolving content operations
projects.description: Backend and admin workflows for content-heavy platforms that need clean data models, migration support, and stable long-term maintenance.

projects.title: Modular backend services for web products
projects.description: Domain-oriented APIs designed for growth, testing, authentication, and a smooth path toward service decomposition when the product needs it.

projects.title: Frontend systems that stay consistent as they scale
projects.description: Interfaces built around reusable components, straightforward UX, and efficient integration with backend services and internal APIs.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Available for remote roles, freelance work, and technical collaboration from Chile.
contact.note: Based in Chile. Open to remote collaboration.

footer.tagline: Built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
